series.name: Frequency
series.description: The time interval at which observations occur over a given time period.

series.name: Base Currency
series.description: The first currency in a currency pair quotation. Also known as the transaction currency.

series.name: Quote Currency
series.description: The second currency in a currency quote pair. Also known as counter currency.

series.name: Tenor
series.description: The amount of time left for the repayment of a loan or until a financial contract expires.

observation.name: Time Period
observation.description: The period of time or point in time to which the measured observation refers.

series.name: Decimals
series.description: The number of digits to the right of a decimal point.

series.name: Calculated
series.description: Indicates if the value is calculated or an actual observation.

series.name: Unit Multiplier
series.description: Exponent in base 10 specified so that multiplying the observation numeric values by 10^UNIT_MULT gives a value expressed in the UNIT.

series.name: Collection Indicator
series.description: Dates or periods during which the observations have been collected.
